import heapq
from collections import Counter

class HuffmanNode:
    def __init__(self, char, freq, left=None, right=None):
        self.char = char
        self.freq = freq
        self.left = left
        self.right = right

    def __lt__(self, other):
        return self.freq < other.freq

def build_frequency_table(text):
    return Counter(text)

def build_huffman_tree(freq_table):
    priority_queue = []
    for char, freq in freq_table.items():
        heapq.heappush(priority_queue, HuffmanNode(char, freq))

    while len(priority_queue) > 1:
        left_child = heapq.heappop(priority_queue)
        right_child = heapq.heappop(priority_queue)

        merged_node = HuffmanNode(None, left_child.freq + right_child.freq, left_child, right_child)
        heapq.heappush(priority_queue, merged_node)

    return priority_queue[0] if priority_queue else None

def generate_huffman_codes(root):
    codes = {}
    
    def _generate_codes_recursive(node, current_code):
        if node is None:
            return

        if node.char is not None:
            codes[node.char] = current_code if current_code else "0"  # Handle single character input
            return

        _generate_codes_recursive(node.left, current_code + "0")
        _generate_codes_recursive(node.right, current_code + "1")

    if root:
        _generate_codes_recursive(root, "")
    return codes

def encode_text(text, codes):
    encoded_text = ""
    for char in text:
        encoded_text += codes[char]
    return encoded_text

def decode_text(encoded_text, root):
    decoded_text = []
    current_node = root

    if root is None:
        return ""
    
    # Handle the case of a single character in the input text
    if root.char is not None:
        return root.char * len(encoded_text) if root.char else ""

    for bit in encoded_text:
        if bit == '0':
            current_node = current_node.left
        else: # bit == '1'
            current_node = current_node.right

        if current_node.char is not None:
            decoded_text.append(current_node.char)
            current_node = root
            
    return "".join(decoded_text)

def huffman_coding(text):
    if not text:
        return "", None, {}

    freq_table = build_frequency_table(text)
    root = build_huffman_tree(freq_table)
    codes = generate_huffman_codes(root)
    encoded_text = encode_text(text, codes)

    return encoded_text, root, codes

# Example usage (not part of the requested output, but useful for testing)
if __name__ == '__main__':
    text_to_encode = "this is an example for huffman coding"
    
    encoded_data, huffman_tree_root, huffman_codes = huffman_coding(text_to_encode)
    
    print(f"Original text: {text_to_encode}")
    print(f"Huffman Codes: {huffman_codes}")
    print(f"Encoded text: {encoded_data}")
    
    decoded_text = decode_text(encoded_data, huffman_tree_root)
    print(f"Decoded text: {decoded_text}")
    
    assert text_to_encode == decoded_text

    print("\n--- Test with single character ---")
    text_single = "a"
    encoded_single, root_single, codes_single = huffman_coding(text_single)
    print(f"Original text: {text_single}")
    print(f"Huffman Codes: {codes_single}")
    print(f"Encoded text: {encoded_single}")
    decoded_single = decode_text(encoded_single, root_single)
    print(f"Decoded text: {decoded_single}")
    assert text_single == decoded_single

    print("\n--- Test with two characters ---")
    text_two = "aaabbc"
    encoded_two, root_two, codes_two = huffman_coding(text_two)
    print(f"Original text: {text_two}")
    print(f"Huffman Codes: {codes_two}")
    print(f"Encoded text: {encoded_two}")
    decoded_two = decode_text(encoded_two, root_two)
    print(f"Decoded text: {decoded_two}")
    assert text_two == decoded_two

    print("\n--- Test with empty string ---")
    text_empty = ""
    encoded_empty, root_empty, codes_empty = huffman_coding(text_empty)
    print(f"Original text: '{text_empty}'")
    print(f"Encoded text: '{encoded_empty}'")
    print(f"Decoded text: '{decode_text(encoded_empty, root_empty)}'")
    assert text_empty == decode_text(encoded_empty, root_empty)
